validation.emptyAutomation: Cannot save empty automation. Please add at least one trigger and one action node.
validation.noTrigger: Automation must have at least one trigger node. Please add a trigger from the node palette.
validation.noAction: Automation must have at least one action node. Please add an action from the node palette.
validation.transpileFailed: Failed to transpile flow to automation config
validation.noAutomationId: No automation ID set. Use saveAutomation() for new automations.

node.duplicateId: ID already in use — must be unique within the automation

entityRequired.state: Entity is required for state triggers
entityRequired.numericState: Entity is required for numeric state triggers
entityRequired.zone: Entity is required for zone triggers

action.serviceOrEventRequired: Either a service (e.g. light.turn_on) or an event name is required
action.serviceFormat: Service must be in domain.service format (e.g., light.turn_on)

wait.templateOrTriggerRequired: Wait node requires either a template condition or trigger. Use a Delay node for simple time-based pauses.

entityRequired.state: Entity is required for state conditions
entityRequired.numericState: Entity is required for numeric state conditions
entityRequired.zone: Entity is required for zone conditions

condition.groupConditionsRequired: At least one condition must be defined

setVariables.atLeastOne: At least one variable must be defined

connection.noAuth: No authentication configured for REST API
connection.corsError: Cannot connect - check URL and CORS settings
connection.noMethod: No working Home Assistant connection method found

form.urlTokenRequired: Please provide both URL and token

import.fileReadFailed: Failed to import flow. Please check the file format.

yaml.staleWarning: Showing last valid YAML - fix errors to update
